summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #555 (streamable-http feature branch) by adding enum documentation and correcting misleading log messages, then commit and push.
summary.outcome: Fixed two P2 items from Greptile review: documented 'streamable-http' as a valid transport option in template.rs and corrected misleading 'SSE' log messages in client.rs to say 'remote'. Changes compiled, formatted, committed, and pushed after a YubiKey authentication step.

repo: PR #555 is in the moltis-org/moltis repo on branch streamable-http, worked on via a worktree at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/volfco/streamable-http
Greptile is used as an automated reviewer on this repo, posting issue-level comments (not review thread comments) with confidence scores
Review feedback can appear either as resolvable conversation threads or as plain issue-level comments on a PR — the latter cannot be 'resolved' via the API

code.finding: Transport options were not fully documented — 'streamable-http' was missing as a valid transport value alongside 'stdio' and 'sse'
connect_sse() is used for both SSE and StreamableHttp transports; log messages incorrectly said 'SSE' in both cases and needed to be generalized to 'remote'
Had one resolvable review thread comment that was addressed and resolved

workflow: GitHub review threads and issue-level PR comments are separate API endpoints — unresolved threads use the GraphQL reviewThreads endpoint, while Greptile-style bot feedback shows up as issue comments via /issues/comments
YubiKey hardware authentication is required for git push operations in this environment

friction: YubiKey tap required mid-session for git push, interrupting the automated flow and requiring a manual retry
Review comments were split across multiple GitHub endpoints (review threads vs issue comments), requiring multiple API calls to find all actionable feedback
